coreExperience.focusRule: one focused action at a time
coreExperience.chatAccess: Chat remains one tap away and may show unread count
coreExperience.workspaceRule: verified workspaces add operating capability without removing personal consumer access
coreExperience.roleRule: do not expose a manual role switcher on the universal consumer screen

actionDensity.moreThanFiveActions: use a labelled horizontal rail, menu or progressive next state
actionDensity.duplicateRule: the same action label must not appear in both page content and the persistent dock unless one is a clearly named shortcut
actionDensity.destructiveRule: destructive actions require confirmation and an undo or recovery path where technically possible

allowedSignals: pending orders bookings rides work and payments
personalization.explanationRule: when personalization changes price, availability, eligibility, ranking or payout, show the deciding reason in plain language

responsive.safeArea: persistent controls must include device safe-area insets
responsive.keyboard: the focused input and primary submit action must remain visible above the software keyboard
responsive.overflow: no page-level horizontal overflow; dense tables use an explicitly labelled scroll region or responsive row layout
responsive.text: no viewport-width font scaling; long labels wrap or use a shorter approved label

requirements: every interactive control has a stable accessible name
icons are not the sole meaning for unfamiliar actions
focus order follows reading and action order
selected expanded invalid busy and live states are announced
colour is never the only status signal
forms preserve values after validation or network failure
video has captions controls and a non-motion fallback

stateBehavior.loading: use a stable skeleton matching the final layout; never shift the primary action
stateBehavior.empty: state what is empty, why it may be empty and the single best next action
stateBehavior.partial: render available decision data and mark only the missing field; do not block unrelated actions
stateBehavior.offline: show cached safe content, queue eligible writes and clearly mark actions that require connectivity
stateBehavior.timeout: preserve input and expose retry plus support after repeated failure
stateBehavior.error: show plain-language cause category, recovery action and reference ID without internal stack text
stateBehavior.permission-denied: explain the affected feature and provide settings or manual fallback
stateBehavior.restricted: state the verification, serviceability or policy condition and the allowed next step
stateBehavior.stale: show last-updated time and prevent irreversible decisions on expired price, stock, location or payout data
stateBehavior.duplicate-request: return the original result for idempotent commands and never create a second charge order payout or task
